title: Eva spots the glitter
prompt: Mid-shot on @beach-shore — @Papa already standing knee-deep in the gentle surf, @Eva already perched up on his shoulders. Eva freezes, eyes locked on something glittering in the wet sand at the tide line, off to the right. She points urgently with her tiny finger. Papa follows her gaze and squints. The waves hush a moment. Eva (wide-eyed, urgent stage-whisper): "Daddy... DADDY look — it's SHINY!" Papa (squinting, hand to forehead): "What is THAT?" Eva (tugging at his hair, bouncing on his shoulders): "Get it get it GET IT!" Papa starts wading toward the shore, Eva still pointing.
